_readme: Manifest for the Post Orders tab. To publish a document: 1) drop the PDF into public/docs/post-orders/, 2) add an entry below with the file name, 3) commit. Entries with "file": null render as 'Document pending' placeholder cards.

sections.title: Post Orders
sections.description: Standing orders for each post, organized by campus.

sections.title: Event Post Orders
sections.description: Orders for specific events: games, performances, ceremonies, and special coverage.

sections.title: General Expectations
sections.description: Department-wide conduct, appearance, communication, and documentation expectations.
